title: It looks like you need our new website
content:

- Skip to main content
This website is no longer available. You’ll find what you need at our new website: Tahatū Career Navigator
Get in touch with us for career information.
We're here from 8:30am to 5pm Monday to Friday – except Wednesdays when we're here from 9.30am to 5pm.
We're closed on all public holidays, including Wellington Anniversary.
Email us with your career question

## It looks like you need our new website
The careers.govt.nz website is no longer available.
Find the best of its content and tools – and more – at our new career-planning website: Tahatū Career Navigator
